description: Lock the machine-gun node to Maxim's 1884 fully automatic recoil-operated scope and source-backed breech, cartridge, and smokeless-powder edge semantics.

checks.reason: The node is anchored to Maxim's first effective fully automatic machine gun, not earlier hand-cranked rapid-fire weapons.
The Maxim mechanism used breech-action ejection and feeding of cartridges.
The source-backed automatic firing cycle ejects a spent cartridge and draws in the next cartridge.
Smokeless powder is sourced as maximizing effectiveness and practical battlefield use rather than enabling the first recoil mechanism.
